hub.title: Access Control
hub.subtitle: Central administration for navigation, roles, and users.

menuCatalogue.title: Menu Catalogue
menuCatalogue.description: Define the global navigation structure (modules, groups, and screens).

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Define roles and assign which menu screens each role can access.

users.title: Users & Roles
users.description: Manage user accounts and assign roles.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete role "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
roles.permissionsHint: Select which screens the {{role}} role can access. Only leaf items grant permissions.

users.title: Users & Roles
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{name}}"?
users.roleHint: The role determines which menu screens and permissions the user receives at login.
users.passwordMin: Password must have at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
users.userLimitReached: You've reached your plan's user limit. Contact your provider to upgrade the plan or free up a seat by disabling an existing user.

menuCatalogue.title: Menu Catalogue
menuCatalogue.intro: Manage the global navigation catalogue. Changes affect all tenants.
menuCatalogue.readOnly: Read-only view — contact the platform administrator to edit.
